questions.hindi: यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है।
options: This photo is taken by me.
This mistake was made by the students.
This work is done by him.
This book is read by me.
questions.answer: This book is read by me.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है।" = "This book is read by me."

options: taken
given
written
done
questions.answer: done
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "This work is done by him."

questions.sentence: This letter were written by her.
options: This letter were written by her.
This letter was written by her.
questions.answer: This letter was written by her.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This letter was written by her."

questions.hindi: खाना माँ के द्वारा बनाया जाता है।
options: This mistake was made by him.
This email was sent yesterday.
This house was built by my grandfather.
The food is cooked by mother.
questions.answer: The food is cooked by mother.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "खाना माँ के द्वारा बनाया जाता है।" = "The food is cooked by mother."

questions.sentence: This house was _____ by my grandfather.
options: prepared
solved
sung
built
questions.answer: built
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "This house was built by my grandfather."

questions.sentence: This song are sung by her.
options: This song are sung by her.
This song is sung by her.
questions.answer: This song is sung by her.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This song is sung by her."
